feed.title: Zerun Niu
feed.subtitle: Zerun Niu is an MPhil student in Computer Science at The University of Sydney, working on federated learning, semantic communication, and efficient AI systems.

entry.title: building this research website
entry.content:
This website collects my research projects, publications, teaching interests, and notes on efficient AI systems.

I plan to use this space for short technical notes on federated learning, semantic communication, parameter-efficient tuning, and the engineering practices that make research experiments reproducible.
entry.summary: A short note on the purpose of this site.
